calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing & Petition For Releif From Claim Requirement
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PETITIONER LORRAINE PARKER'S Petition For Releif From Claim Requirement IS DENIED. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION IS HEARSAY WITH RESPECT TO THE CRITICAL FACTS THAT FORM THE BASIS FOR THE PETITION. THESE STATEMENTS, IN PARTICULAR PARAGRAPHS 5-7 OF THE HADWEN DECLARATION, ARE NOT ADMISSIBLE. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT FACTS THAT SUPPORT HER CLAIM. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189. (302/PJM/PB)
